Memory.title: Memory
Memory.description: A customized memory, reminder, note, or preference persisted in Zoya's database.

userId.description: The Google owner UID of the user.

text.description: The content of the memory or note.

category.description: The classification category of the memory.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this memory was logged.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this memory was modified.

/users/{userId}/memories/{memoryId}.description: Stores user-authored memories, notes, and reminders for Zoya's voice and chat interface.
